mapper.sql: id, created_by, source_url, aria2_gid, target_storage_root_id, target_relative_path, file_name, status, progress, total_bytes, completed_bytes, speed_bytes_per_second, error_message, created_at, updated_at, completed_at
mapper.select: SELECT FROM download_task WHERE status IN ('WAITING', 'RUNNING', 'PAUSED')
SELECT FROM download_task WHERE aria2_gid = #{aria2Gid} LIMIT 1
